items.title: The Breakout That Wasn't
items.description: A stylized recreation of a classic range fakeout. Price compresses under a well-watched ceiling, breaks out on a burst of volume - and fails. You decide, bar by bar, what a disciplined trader does at each moment.

items.title: Pullback in a Trend
items.description: A stylized recreation of a steady uptrend that suddenly gives back a week of gains in three red bars. The trend is intact by every measure - but it does not feel that way. Trade the plan, not the feeling.

items.title: The Gap Down
items.description: A stylized recreation of a liquidity shock: an overnight gap straight through your stop, then a violent, tradeable chop. The plan did not survive contact - now your conduct under fire is the whole game.
